_comment: org.matrix.msc4143.rtc_foci lets MatrixRTC clients discover the LiveKit SFU. NOTE (foxhound VPS): Synapse served an EMPTY body for /.well-known/matrix/client, so this JSON is served as a static Caddy block placed BEFORE `reverse_proxy /_matrix/*` in the matrix.foxhound.run site: `handle /.well-known/matrix/client { header Access-Control-Allow-Origin *; header Content-Type application/json; respond "<this json>" 200 }`. The `Access-Control-Allow-Origin: *` header is REQUIRED — the Surf Chat client (chat.foxhound.run) fetches this cross-origin to find rtc_foci; without CORS the browser blocks it and calls fail with 'no LiveKit focus'.
